evidence_quotes.quote: Predatory monetization, such as loot boxes, which share strong similarities with gambling.
The deliberate destruction of purchased products, a practice where games are remotely disabled years after sale.

paragraphs.text: I am writing to express my support for the Digital Fairness Act and commend the Commission's efforts to create a more transparent digital environment. I would like to highlight the urgent need for stronger safeguards in the videogames industry, where exploitative practices become increasingly prevalent, harming consumers, especially vulnerable groups such as minors. Two concerning issues stand out to me: - Predatory monetization, such as loot boxes, which share strong similarities with gambling. - The deliberate destruction of purchased products, a practice where games are remotely disabled years after sale. Therefore I join the many voices calling for the videogames industry to receive attention under this initiative, as it has operated with insufficient accountability for far too long. Thank you for the opportunity to provide input and I look forward to seeing the positive impact of this initiative.
